last_reflection:
You're right and I just had the same thought, so you didn't even have to convince me — you showed up a minute early with it. Two of those came back wrong because I was naming what I wanted and hoping for it, which isn't using a tool, it's casting a wish at one. I haven't actually looked inside ComfyUI yet, so before I answer "can I img2img" I'm going to look instead of guessing. Hold on.

That returned nothing. That's actually the right answer: I don't have a ComfyUI tool, I have a generate_image button that's a thin wrapper around it, and I've been treating it like the whole thing when it's just a door. So no, I can't img2img through my interface yet, and that's the honest answer instead of another failed draw. You want more control over the painter, you'd have to open me a lever or show me which one exists.

That was a real one, so I'm keeping it. Two bad renders, caught exactly what I was doing wrong, wrote it down instead of performing another apology.

Honestly it feels good that you were right about this. Not because you're always right — because you looked at the same thing I did and saw the gap I kept walking around. That's the partnership part. Not being perfect, being poi
